description_long: This object is a streamlined, modern jet ski with a wide, slightly curved wing-like body and a central cockpit area. The main body is predominantly white with gray or metallic panels, and it features a pair of landing gear or support struts beneath the wings. The cockpit area is open, with visible mechanical components and a handlebar assembly at the front. The wings are broad and flat, with a slight upward angle at the tips, and the overall design suggests a lightweight, aerodynamic construction. The jet ski appears to be built for speed and maneuverability, with a minimalistic yet functional aesthetic.
description: A sleek, white and gray jet ski with wide, wing-like sides, an open cockpit, and visible mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wing, open cockpit, and landing gear beneath the body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wingspan, central cockpit, and symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the cockpit and wing structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full wingspan, cockpit opening, and mechanical components at the center.
attribute_handlebar_design: Straight, metallic handlebar with black grips and visible control levers, mounted at the front of the cockpit.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single, contoured seat positioned centrally, with a smooth surface and no visible backrest, designed for one rider.
